title: DS-BlockedCrafts
description: Block the crafts you want! FREE!!!!
body:
# **DS-BlockedCrafts**

![Imagen de portada](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f28aa5aa122364c45fb4a37de77a27b0cc0547.png)

We are new to developing plugins, we like to analyze more the technical aspect of Minecraft. I would appreciate it if you would be kind when you found bugs or would like to give me a suggestion to improve. All complaints please must be made through my Discord server

**Features:**
- Block any crafting you want
- Free :3
- Customizable item blacklist
- 0 Memory Leaks, such as "some" known resources
- Customizable messages and permissions

**[Check our Wiki for more information about the configuration, permissions and commands of this resource.](https://wiki.dragonstudio.store/)**
